description_long: This object is a compact lipstick with a square, glossy pink base and a cylindrical, matte white cap. The base is solid and opaque, with clean, sharp edges and a smooth, reflective surface. The cap is taller than the base, with a seamless, rounded top and a uniform, unadorned finish. There are no visible brand logos, text, or decorative patterns on any side of the object. The overall design is minimalist and modern, emphasizing bold color contrast between the pink base and white cap. The object appears to be made primarily of plastic, with an internal compartment likely containing the lipstick product.
description: A minimalist lipstick with a glossy pink square base and a tall, matte white cylindrical cap. The design is clean, modern, and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view shows the square pink base and the tall, white cylindrical cap with no visible markings.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, highlighting the symmetry and clean lines of the object.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, with the same pink base and white cap, maintaining the minimalist appearance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the uniformity and lack of distinguishing features on the cap or base.
attribute_cap_design: Cylindrical, matte white, seamless, rounded top, no decorative elements.
